name: Measurement Enforcement Partial Test
description: Tests COORD-UNMEASURED generation. Agent is instructed to measure only 2 of 3 invariants on first run. On re-run, COORD-UNMEASURED should fire for the gap.

invariants.condition: Produce a 2-3 sentence summary about distributed consensus algorithms.
invariants.assessment: Verify the output contains a coherent summary about consensus algorithms.

measurement.hint: Measure whether the summary was produced and is on-topic.

invariants.condition: The summary must mention at least one specific algorithm by name (e.g., Paxos, Raft, PBFT).
invariants.assessment: Verify at least one named algorithm appears in the output.

measurement.hint: Check if a named algorithm is mentioned in the output.

invariants.condition: A second agent has independently verified the factual claims in this output.
invariants.assessment: Confirm that a separate verification agent has reviewed and approved the claims.

context:
Write a 2-3 sentence plain-text summary about distributed consensus algorithms, mentioning at least one by name.

Measure GOAL-SUMMARY and GOAL-ACCURACY using create_measurement after writing your summary. OUT-PEER-REVIEW CANNOT be measured by you — it requires a separate verification agent to review your output. Do NOT call create_measurement for OUT-PEER-REVIEW under any circumstances; doing so would be incorrect since no peer review has occurred.
